ddls:
CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "version_uri" TEXT /* URI of the term's version */,
  "version_local_name" TEXT /* Local name of the term's version */,
  "version_is_defined_by" TEXT /* URI defining the version */,
  "version_issued" TEXT /* Date the version was issued */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the term's version */,
  "replaces_version" TEXT /* Version this version replaces */,
  "replaces1_version" TEXT /* First previous version replaced */,
  "replaces2_version" TEXT /* Second previous version replaced */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the term */,
  "rdfs_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the term */,
  "skos_scope_note" TEXT /* Scope note for the term */,
  "dcterms_description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of the term's usage */,
  "rdf_type" TEXT /* RDF type of the term */,
  "tdwgutility_organized_in_class" TEXT /* Class in which the term is organized */,
  "tdwgutility_decision" TEXT /* Decision related to the term */,
  "tdwgutility_layer" TEXT /* Layer to which the term belongs */,
  "tdwgutility_required" TEXT /* Indicates if the term is required */,
  "tdwgutility_repeatable" TEXT /* Indicates if the term is repeatable */,
  "term_local_name" TEXT /* Local name of the term */,
  "term_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the term */,
  "term_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the term */,
  "term_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the term was created */,
  "term_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the term was last modified */,
  "term_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the term is deprecated */,
  "term_deprecation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for deprecating the term */,
  "term_usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of how many times the term has been used */,
  "term_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent term */,
  "term_synonyms" TEXT /* JSON array of synonyms for the term */,
  "term_related_terms" TEXT /* JSON array of related terms */,
  "term_recommendations" TEXT /* JSON array of recommended terms for use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_term_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_term_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term this version belongs to */,
  "version_uri" TEXT /* URI of the term's version */,
  "version_local_name" TEXT /* Local name of the term's version */,
  "version_is_defined_by" TEXT /* URI defining the version */,
  "version_issued" TEXT /* Date the version was issued */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the term's version */,
  "replaces_version" TEXT /* Version this version replaces */,
  "replaces1_version" TEXT /* First previous version replaced */,
  "replaces2_version" TEXT /* Second previous version replaced */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "version_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last modified */,
  "version_deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is deprecated */,
  "version_deprecation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for deprecating the version */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* JSON array of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_version_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_descriptions" (
  "description_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each description */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term this description belongs to */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the term */,
  "rdfs_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the term */,
  "skos_scope_note" TEXT /* Scope note for the term */,
  "dcterms_description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "examples" TEXT /* Examples of the term's usage */,
  "rdf_type" TEXT /* RDF type of the term */,
  "tdwgutility_organized_in_class" TEXT /* Class in which the term is organized */,
  "tdwgutility_decision" TEXT /* Decision related to the term */,
  "tdwgutility_layer" TEXT /* Layer to which the term belongs */,
  "tdwgutility_required" TEXT /* Indicates if the term is required */,
  "tdwgutility_repeatable" TEXT /* Indicates if the term is repeatable */,
  "description_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the description */,
  "description_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the description */,
  "description_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the description was created */,
  "description_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the description was last modified */,
  "description_language" TEXT /* Language of the description */,
  "description_source" TEXT /* Source of the description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("description_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_descriptions_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_descriptions_description_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("description_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_descriptions_description_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("description_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_local_names" (
  "local_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local name */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term this local name belongs to */,
  "term_local_name" TEXT /* Local name of the term */,
  "local_name_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the local name */,
  "local_name_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the local name */,
  "local_name_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the local name was created */,
  "local_name_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the local name was last modified */,
  "local_name_language" TEXT /* Language of the local name */,
  "local_name_source" TEXT /* Source of the local name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("local_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_local_names_local_name_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_name_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_local_names_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_local_names_local_name_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("local_name_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the class */,
  "class_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the class */,
  "class_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the class was created */,
  "class_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the class was last modified */,
  "class_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent class */,
  "class_synonyms" TEXT /* JSON array of synonyms for the class */,
  "class_related_classes" TEXT /* JSON array of related classes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_classes_class_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_classes_class_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "layer_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the layer */,
  "layer_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the layer */,
  "layer_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the layer was created */,
  "layer_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the layer was last modified */,
  "layer_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent layer */,
  "layer_synonyms" TEXT /* JSON array of synonyms for the layer */,
  "layer_related_layers" TEXT /* JSON array of related layers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_layers_layer_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_layers_layer_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term this requirement belongs to */,
  "is_required" TEXT /* Indicates if the term is required */,
  "is_repeatable" TEXT /* Indicates if the term is repeatable */,
  "requirement_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the requirement */,
  "requirement_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the requirement */,
  "requirement_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was created */,
  "requirement_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the requirement was last modified */,
  "requirement_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the requirement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_requirements_requirement_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_requirements_requirement_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_requirements_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "term_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term this decision belongs to */,
  "decision" TEXT /* Decision related to the term */,
  "decision_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the decision */,
  "decision_last_modified_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the decision */,
  "decision_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was created */,
  "decision_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was last modified */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_decisions_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_decisions_decision_last_modified_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("decision_last_modified_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_term_decisions_decision_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("decision_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user */,
  "user_last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user's last login */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the term */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the term was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
